---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or enhancement
labels: [enhancement]
---

## Summary

A short description of the proposed feature.

## Problem / Motivation

What problem does this solve?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the solution you have in mind.

## Alternatives Considered

Other approaches you considered.

## Spec Impact

- Does this change `Spec.md`? If yes, how?
- Does this affect the Excel format contract?

## Additional Context

Anything else that might help.
